recipes.name: Mapo Tofu
recipes.description: Spicy, numbing tofu in fermented bean sauce with ground pork

equipment_substitutions.note: Use high heat. Slightly different texture but still delicious.

instructions.title: Prep ingredients
instructions.instruction: Cut tofu into cubes. Mince garlic and ginger. Chop green onions. Mix cornstarch with water.
instructions.tips: Prep everything before cooking for smooth workflow.

instructions.title: Blanch tofu
instructions.instruction: Boil water, add tofu, blanch 2 minutes. Drain.
instructions.tips: Removes excess water, helps tofu hold shape.

instructions.title: Cook pork
instructions.instruction: Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok over high heat. Cook pork until browned and crispy, 4-5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Let it crisp - don't stir too much!

instructions.title: Add aromatics
instructions.instruction: Push pork aside. Add 1 tbsp oil, doubanjiang, stir 30 seconds. Add garlic, ginger, stir 30 seconds more.
instructions.tips: Doubanjiang should sizzle and smell amazing.

instructions.title: Simmer
instructions.instruction: Add stock and soy sauce. Simmer. Add tofu gently, simmer 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Be gentle so tofu doesn't break.

instructions.title: Thicken
instructions.instruction: Add cornstarch mixture while stirring gently. Cook 1-2 minutes until thickened.
instructions.tips: Sauce should coat tofu nicely.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Turn off heat. Sprinkle Sichuan pepper and green onions. Serve over rice.
instructions.tips: The numbing sensation is what makes this special!

storage.reheating: Reheat in pan, add splash of water

recipes.name: Thai Green Curry
recipes.description: Creamy coconut curry with chicken and vegetables

instructions.title: Prep ingredients
instructions.instruction: Slice chicken thinly. Prepare vegetables. Pick basil leaves.
instructions.tips: Thin slices cook evenly and quickly.

instructions.title: Fry curry paste
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pot over medium heat. Add curry paste, fry 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
instructions.tips: Paste should darken and smell amazing.

instructions.title: Add coconut milk
instructions.instruction: Pour in coconut milk, stir well. Bring to gentle simmer.
instructions.tips: Stir to combine paste completely.

instructions.title: Cook chicken
instructions.instruction: Add chicken, cook 8-10 minutes until just cooked through.
instructions.tips: Don't overcook or chicken gets tough.

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add bamboo shoots, simmer 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Vegetables should be tender but not mushy.

instructions.title: Season
instructions.instruction: Stir in fish sauce and palm sugar. Taste and adjust.
instructions.tips: Balance sweet, salty, spicy.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Turn off heat. Stir in Thai basil. Serve with jasmine rice.
instructions.tips: Basil wilts in residual heat - perfect!

storage.reheating: Gentle reheat, don't boil

recipes.name: Cacio e Pepe
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta with Pecorino cheese and black pepper

instructions.title: Boil pasta water
instructions.instruction: Bring large pot of water to boil. Salt generously.
instructions.tips: Water should taste like the sea.

instructions.title: Toast pepper
instructions.instruction: Toast black pepper in dry pan over medium heat for 1-2 minutes until fragrant. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Toasting releases the oils and aroma.

instructions.title: Cook pasta
instructions.instruction: Add pasta to boiling water. Cook until al dente (about 8-10 minutes). Reserve 1.5 cups pasta water before draining.
instructions.tips: Pasta water is KEY - don't skip this!

instructions.title: Make sauce
instructions.instruction: In the pan with pepper, add 1 cup hot pasta water. Bring to simmer.
instructions.tips: Water should be simmering gently.

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Add drained pasta to pan. Toss vigorously for 1 minute, adding more pasta water if needed.
instructions.tips: The starch emulsifies into a creamy sauce.

instructions.title: Add cheese
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Add cheese in small handfuls, tossing constantly. Add pasta water to achieve creamy consistency.
instructions.tips: Off heat prevents cheese from clumping!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Plate immediately. Top with more black pepper and cheese.
instructions.tips: Serve right away - waits for no one!

storage.reheating: Add splash of water, gentle heat

recipes.name: Kung Pao Chicken
recipes.description: Spicy stir-fried chicken with peanuts and dried chilies

equipment_substitutions.note: Use highest heat. Works great but wok gives better char.

instructions.title: Prep ingredients
instructions.instruction: Cut chicken into cubes. Prepare all vegetables and aromatics. Mix sauce: soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, cornstarch mixture.
instructions.tips: Everything happens fast - have it all ready!

instructions.title: Toast spices
instructions.instruction: Heat wok over medium heat. Toast Sichuan peppercorns 1-2 minutes until fragrant. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Watch closely - they burn quickly.

instructions.title: Stir-fry chicken
instructions.instruction: Increase heat to high. Add 2 tbsp oil. Stir-fry chicken 5-6 minutes until golden. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't crowd the pan - cook in batches if needed.

instructions.title: Fry chilies
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil. Add dried chilies, fry 30 seconds until darkened and fragrant.
instructions.tips: They should smell amazing but not burn black.

instructions.title: Add aromatics
instructions.instruction: Add garlic and ginger, stir-fry 30 seconds.
instructions.tips: Keep everything moving in the wok.

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Return chicken to wok. Add sauce mixture and green onions. Toss 1-2 minutes until sauce thickens and coats chicken.
instructions.tips: Sauce should be glossy and coat everything.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Add peanuts and toasted Sichuan peppercorns. Toss to combine. Serve immediately over rice.
instructions.tips: Peanuts add great crunch - don't skip them!

storage.reheating: Pan reheat keeps texture best

recipes.name: Pad Thai
recipes.description: Sweet and tangy stir-fried rice noodles with shrimp, egg, and peanuts

equipment_substitutions.note: Works well, just use high heat.

instructions.title: Soak noodles
instructions.instruction: Soak rice noodles in warm water for 30 minutes until pliable but still firm. Drain well.
instructions.tips: Don't oversoak - they'll finish cooking in the wok.

instructions.title: Make sauce
instructions.instruction: Mix tamarind paste, fish sauce, and palm sugar in a small bowl. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Taste and adjust - should be sweet, salty, tangy.

instructions.title: Cook protein
instructions.instruction: Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok over high heat. Add tofu, cook until golden, 3-4 minutes. Remove. Add shrimp, cook 2-3 minutes until pink. Remove.
instructions.tips: Don't overcook shrimp - they cook fast!

instructions.title: Scramble eggs
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil. Pour in beaten eggs, scramble until just set, 1 minute. Push to side.
instructions.tips: Soft scramble is best.

instructions.title: Stir-fry noodles
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil and garlic, fry 30 seconds. Add drained noodles and sauce. Toss vigorously 2-3 minutes.
instructions.tips: High heat! Keep tossing to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Combine everything
instructions.instruction: Return tofu and shrimp to wok. Add bean sprouts and green onions. Toss 1 minute.
instructions.tips: Bean sprouts should stay crunchy.

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Plate immediately. Top with crushed peanuts. Serve with lime wedges.
instructions.tips: Squeeze lime over top - transforms the dish!

storage.reheating: Pan fry quickly to revive texture

recipes.name: Teriyaki Salmon
recipes.description: Pan-seared salmon with sweet and savory teriyaki glaze

instructions.title: Make teriyaki sauce
instructions.instruction: Combine soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, and ginger in a small bowl. Mix until sugar dissolves.
instructions.tips: Stir well so sugar doesn't settle at bottom.

instructions.title: Prep salmon
instructions.instruction: Pat salmon dry with paper towels. Score the skin with 3-4 shallow cuts.
instructions.tips: Dry fish = better sear!

instructions.title: Sear salmon
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pan over medium-high heat. Place salmon skin-side down. Cook 4-5 minutes without moving.
instructions.tips: Don't flip early - let skin get crispy!

instructions.title: Flip and glaze
instructions.instruction: Flip salmon. Pour teriyaki sauce over fish. Cook 3-4 minutes, basting with sauce.
instructions.tips: Spoon sauce over fish repeatedly.

instructions.title: Reduce sauce
instructions.instruction: Remove salmon to plate. Continue cooking sauce 1-2 minutes until thick and glossy.
instructions.tips: Should coat a spoon - that's perfect!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Spoon sauce over salmon. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and green onions. Serve with steamed rice.
instructions.tips: Beautiful, restaurant-quality dish!

storage.reheating: Gentle microwave or 300°F oven

recipes.name: Butter Chicken
recipes.description: Creamy tomato-based curry with tender chicken in aromatic spices

equipment_substitutions.note: Works great, blend right in the pot.

instructions.title: Marinate chicken
instructions.instruction: Mix chicken with yogurt, half the garam masala, and salt. Let sit 20 minutes (or overnight in fridge).
instructions.tips: Longer marination = more tender chicken!

instructions.title: Cook onions
instructions.instruction: Melt 2 tbsp butter in large pot over medium heat. Add onions, cook 8-10 minutes until golden and soft.
instructions.tips: Don't rush - caramelized onions add sweetness.

instructions.title: Add aromatics and spices
instructions.instruction: Add garlic and ginger, cook 1 minute. Add all remaining spices, toast 1 minute until fragrant.
instructions.tips: Blooming spices releases their flavor!

instructions.title: Add tomato
instructions.instruction: Pour in tomato puree. Simmer 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens.
instructions.tips: Sauce should reduce and darken.

instructions.title: Blend sauce
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Blend sauce until smooth using blender or immersion blender. Return to pot.
instructions.tips: Smooth sauce is the key to restaurant-style!

instructions.title: Cook chicken
instructions.instruction: Add marinated chicken to sauce. Simmer 15-20 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
instructions.tips: Stir occasionally so nothing sticks.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Stir in cream and remaining 2 tbsp butter. Cook 2 minutes. Garnish with cilantro. Serve with rice or naan.
instructions.tips: The cream makes it luxuriously smooth!

storage.reheating: Gentle heat, add splash of cream

recipes.name: Pasta Pomodoro
recipes.description: Simple, fresh tomato sauce with basil and garlic over pasta

instructions.title: Start sauce
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in large pan over medium heat. Add garlic and red pepper flakes. Cook 1-2 minutes until garlic is golden (not brown!).
instructions.tips: Watch the garlic - burned garlic is bitter!

instructions.title: Add tomatoes
instructions.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes and salt. Bring to simmer. Cook 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens.
instructions.tips: Sauce should reduce by about 1/3.

instructions.title: Cook pasta
instructions.instruction: While sauce simmers, bring large pot of salted water to boil. Cook pasta until al dente, about 8-10 minutes. Reserve 1 cup pasta water before draining.
instructions.tips: Save that pasta water - it's liquid gold!

instructions.title: Add basil
instructions.instruction: Tear fresh basil leaves and stir into sauce. Cook 1 minute more.
instructions.tips: Fresh basil at the end keeps it bright!

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Add drained pasta to sauce. Toss well, adding pasta water as needed to achieve silky consistency.
instructions.tips: The starch helps sauce cling to pasta.

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Plate immediately. Top with grated Parmesan and more fresh basil if desired.
instructions.tips: Simple perfection - sometimes less is more!

storage.fridge: 3 days - store sauce and pasta separately
storage.reheating: Combine and heat gently

recipes.name: Miso Soup
recipes.description: Traditional Japanese soup with tofu, seaweed, and fermented soybean paste

instructions.title: Prepare ingredients
instructions.instruction: Cube tofu. Soak wakame in water for 5 minutes, then drain. Slice green onions.
instructions.tips: Wakame expands a lot - don't use too much!

instructions.title: Heat dashi
instructions.instruction: Bring dashi stock to a gentle simmer in pot over medium heat. Do not boil.
instructions.tips: Boiling kills the delicate flavors.

instructions.title: Add tofu and wakame
instructions.instruction: Add tofu cubes and rehydrated wakame. Simmer gently for 2-3 minutes.
instructions.tips: Handle tofu gently so it doesn't break.

instructions.title: Dissolve miso
instructions.instruction: Put miso paste in a ladle or small bowl. Add a little hot broth and whisk until smooth. Pour back into pot.
instructions.tips: Never boil miso - it destroys the probiotics!

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Turn off heat immediately after adding miso. Ladle into bowls and top with green onions.
instructions.tips: Serve immediately - miso soup waits for no one!

storage.reheating: Gentle heat, don't boil

recipes.name: Paella Valenciana
recipes.description: Traditional Spanish rice dish with chicken, rabbit, and vegetables

equipment_substitutions.note: Use widest pan you have. Won't be as traditional but works well.

instructions.title: Prepare saffron
instructions.instruction: Steep saffron threads in 2 tbsp warm water. Set aside.
instructions.tips: This releases the color and flavor.

instructions.title: Brown chicken
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in paella pan over medium-high heat. Season chicken with salt. Brown on all sides, 8-10 minutes. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Good browning = deep flavor!

instructions.title: Cook vegetables
instructions.instruction: In same pan, add garlic and green beans. Cook 3 minutes. Add grated tomato and paprika. Cook until tomato reduces, 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Scrape up the browned bits from chicken.

instructions.title: Add rice
instructions.instruction: Add rice to pan. Stir to coat with oil and tomato, 2 minutes.
instructions.tips: Toast the rice for better texture.

instructions.title: Add liquid
instructions.instruction: Pour in hot stock and saffron water. Add rosemary sprig. Arrange chicken pieces on top. DO NOT STIR from this point forward!
instructions.tips: The socarrat (crispy bottom) forms when you don't stir!

instructions.title: Simmer
instructions.instruction: Bring to boil, then reduce to medium-low. Cook 20 minutes without stirring. After 10 minutes, add white beans.
instructions.tips: Listen for sizzling - that's the socarrat forming!

instructions.title: Rest and serve
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Cover with foil or towel, rest 5 minutes. Serve with lemon wedges.
instructions.tips: The rest allows rice to absorb final liquid.

storage.reheating: Pan fry to restore crispy bottom

recipes.name: Shakshuka
recipes.description: Eggs poached in spiced tomato sauce with peppers and onions

instructions.title: Cook aromatics
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in large pan over medium heat. Add onions and peppers. Cook 8-10 minutes until soft.
instructions.tips: Soft vegetables make a better base.

instructions.title: Add garlic and spices
instructions.instruction: Add garlic, cumin, paprika, and cayenne. Cook 1 minute until fragrant.
instructions.tips: Spices bloom and release oils.

instructions.title: Add tomatoes
instructions.instruction: Pour in crushed tomatoes and salt. Stir well. Simmer 10-15 minutes until sauce thickens.
instructions.tips: Sauce should be thick, not watery.

instructions.title: Make wells for eggs
instructions.instruction: Use a spoon to make 6 small wells in the sauce.
instructions.tips: Space them evenly around the pan.

instructions.title: Add eggs
instructions.instruction: Crack one egg into each well. Cover pan with lid.
instructions.tips: Crack eggs into a small bowl first to avoid shells.

instructions.title: Cook eggs
instructions.instruction: Cook 5-8 minutes until whites are set but yolks are still runny. Check at 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Everyone likes eggs different - adjust time to preference!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Sprinkle with feta and cilantro. Serve with crusty bread for dipping.
instructions.tips: Runny yolk mixes with sauce - perfection!

storage.reheating: Reheat sauce, add fresh eggs

attribution.inspiration: North African and Middle Eastern breakfast

recipes.name: Risotto alla Milanese
recipes.description: Creamy saffron-infused risotto with Parmesan

instructions.title: Prep saffron and stock
instructions.instruction: Steep saffron in 2 tbsp warm stock. Keep remaining stock hot in separate pot.
instructions.tips: Hot stock is KEY - cold stock stops the cooking.

instructions.title: Soften onion
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil and 2 tbsp butter in large pan over medium heat. Add onion, cook 5 minutes until translucent, not brown.
instructions.tips: Slow and gentle - don't brown the onion.

instructions.title: Toast rice
instructions.instruction: Add rice, stir to coat with fat. Toast 2 minutes until edges become translucent.
instructions.tips: This creates better texture and prevents mushiness.

instructions.title: Add wine
instructions.instruction: Pour in wine. Stir constantly until wine is absorbed, about 2 minutes.
instructions.tips: Wine adds acidity and depth.

instructions.title: Add stock gradually
instructions.instruction: Add hot stock one ladle at a time, stirring frequently. Wait until each addition is absorbed before adding more. Continue 18-20 minutes.
instructions.tips: Patience! This can't be rushed. Stir often but not constantly.

instructions.title: Add saffron
instructions.instruction: When rice is almost done (tender but slight bite), stir in saffron water. Cook 2 more minutes.
instructions.tips: Beautiful golden color should spread throughout.

instructions.title: Mantecatura
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Stir in remaining 2 tbsp butter and Parmesan vigorously. Season with salt. Let rest 2 minutes. Serve immediately.
instructions.tips: This finishing step makes it impossibly creamy!

storage.reheating: Add stock and stir over gentle heat

recipes.name: Dal Tadka
recipes.description: Creamy spiced lentils with aromatic tempering

equipment_substitutions.note: Takes longer (45 min vs 15 min) but same result.

instructions.title: Cook lentils
instructions.instruction: Rinse lentils until water runs clear. In pot, combine lentils, water, turmeric, and salt. Bring to boil, then simmer 25-30 minutes until soft and creamy. Stir occasionally.
instructions.tips: Add more water if too thick - should be soup-like.

instructions.title: Mash lentils
instructions.instruction: Use back of spoon or potato masher to partially mash lentils for creamier texture. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't make it completely smooth - some texture is good!

instructions.title: Prepare tadka
instructions.instruction: Heat ghee in small pan over medium heat. Add cumin seeds, let them sizzle 30 seconds.
instructions.tips: This is the tadka - the aromatic tempering!

instructions.title: Add aromatics
instructions.instruction: Add onion to tadka. Cook 5 minutes until golden. Add ginger, garlic, green chili. Cook 1 minute.
instructions.tips: Golden onions add sweetness.

instructions.title: Add tomato and spices
instructions.instruction: Add tomato, red chili powder, cook 3 minutes until tomato softens. Add garam masala.
instructions.tips: Tomato should break down and become saucy.

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Pour tadka into cooked lentils. Stir well. Simmer 5 minutes to let flavors meld.
instructions.tips: The sizzling tadka hitting lentils smells AMAZING!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Garnish with fresh cilantro. Serve hot with rice or roti.
instructions.tips: Comfort food at its finest!

storage.reheating: Add splash of water, heat gently

recipes.name: Pho Bo
recipes.description: Aromatic Vietnamese beef noodle soup with rice noodles and fresh herbs

instructions.title: Parboil bones
instructions.instruction: Blanch beef bones in boiling water for 10 minutes. Drain, rinse bones and pot. This removes impurities.
instructions.tips: This step makes for clearer, cleaner broth.

instructions.title: Char aromatics
instructions.instruction: Char onion and ginger over open flame or under broiler until blackened, 5-8 minutes. This adds depth!
instructions.tips: The char is essential for authentic flavor!

instructions.title: Toast spices
instructions.instruction: In dry pan, toast star anise, cinnamon, and coriander seeds until fragrant, 2-3 minutes.
instructions.tips: Watch carefully - they burn fast!

instructions.title: Make broth
instructions.instruction: Add bones, charred aromatics, toasted spices, and 4 liters water to large pot. Bring to boil, then reduce to gentle simmer. Skim foam regularly. Cook 2.5 hours.
instructions.tips: Low and slow makes the best broth. Don't rush!

instructions.title: Cook brisket
instructions.instruction: After 1.5 hours, add brisket to broth. Continue simmering 1 more hour until tender.
instructions.tips: Brisket should be fork-tender.

instructions.title: Season broth
instructions.instruction: Remove and slice brisket. Strain broth. Return to pot, add fish sauce and rock sugar. Taste and adjust seasoning.
instructions.tips: Should be savory, slightly sweet, complex.

instructions.title: Cook noodles and serve
instructions.instruction: Cook rice noodles according to package. Divide among bowls. Top with sliced brisket and hot broth. Serve with herb plate (basil, cilantro, bean sprouts, lime, jalapeño, hoisin, sriracha).
instructions.tips: Everyone customizes their own bowl - that's the fun!

storage.reheating: Heat broth, cook fresh noodles

recipes.name: Tacos al Pastor
recipes.description: Marinated pork tacos with pineapple, inspired by Lebanese shawarma

equipment_substitutions.note: Pan works great. High heat for char!

instructions.title: Rehydrate chilies
instructions.instruction: Toast guajillo chilies in dry pan 30 seconds per side. Soak in hot water 15 minutes until soft.
instructions.tips: Don't burn them - just a light toast!

instructions.title: Make marinade
instructions.instruction: Blend rehydrated chilies, chipotle, garlic, onion, orange juice, vinegar, cumin, oregano, achiote paste until smooth.
instructions.tips: Should be smooth and vibrant red!

instructions.title: Marinate pork
instructions.instruction: Coat pork slices thoroughly with marinade. Refrigerate minimum 2 hours, ideally overnight.
instructions.tips: Longer marination = more flavor penetration.

instructions.title: Cook pork
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in large pan over high heat. Working in batches, cook marinated pork 3-4 minutes per side until charred and cooked through.
instructions.tips: High heat! You want char and caramelization.

instructions.title: Char pineapple
instructions.instruction: In same pan, cook pineapple chunks 2-3 minutes until slightly charred.
instructions.tips: Caramelized pineapple is magical!

instructions.title: Chop meat
instructions.instruction: Chop cooked pork into small pieces on cutting board.
instructions.tips: Small pieces are traditional and easier to eat.

instructions.title: Warm tortillas and serve
instructions.instruction: Warm tortillas in dry pan or over flame. Serve pork in tortillas topped with pineapple, cilantro, onion, and lime.
instructions.tips: Squeeze lime over everything - it ties it all together!

storage.reheating: Pan fry to restore char

recipes.name: Vietnamese Spring Rolls
recipes.description: Fresh rice paper rolls with shrimp, vegetables, and herbs

instructions.title: Prep all ingredients
instructions.instruction: Cook and cool shrimp. Cook vermicelli, drain, rinse with cold water. Julienne vegetables. Wash and dry herbs. Arrange everything on a large platter.
instructions.tips: Assembly line setup makes rolling easy!

instructions.title: Make peanut sauce
instructions.instruction: Mix hoisin sauce, peanut butter, and lime juice. Add water if too thick. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Should be dipping consistency, not paste.

instructions.title: Soften rice paper
instructions.instruction: Fill large shallow bowl with warm water. Dip one rice paper for 5-10 seconds until pliable. Lay on clean, damp towel.
instructions.tips: Don't oversoak - it continues softening!

instructions.title: Assemble roll
instructions.instruction: On bottom third of wrapper, layer: lettuce, vermicelli, vegetables, 2-3 shrimp (cut in half lengthwise), herbs.
instructions.tips: Don't overfill - less is more!

instructions.title: Roll tightly
instructions.instruction: Fold bottom edge over filling. Fold in sides. Roll up tightly. Place seam-side down.
instructions.tips: Tight rolls hold together better.

instructions.title: Repeat
instructions.instruction: Continue with remaining wrappers and filling. Keep finished rolls covered with damp towel.
instructions.tips: They dry out fast - work quickly!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Cut rolls in half on diagonal. Serve immediately with peanut sauce.
instructions.tips: Best eaten fresh - don't refrigerate!

storage.reheating: Not applicable

recipes.name: Chana Masala
recipes.description: Spiced chickpea curry with tomatoes and aromatic spices

instructions.title: Temper spices
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pot over medium heat. Add cumin seeds, let sizzle 30 seconds until fragrant.
instructions.tips: This releases the aromatic oils!

instructions.title: Cook onions
instructions.instruction: Add onions, cook 8-10 minutes until golden brown.
instructions.tips: Well-browned onions = deep flavor.

instructions.title: Add aromatics and spices
instructions.instruction: Add ginger and garlic, cook 1 minute. Add all ground spices, cook 1 minute more.
instructions.tips: Spices should smell toasted, not burned.

instructions.title: Add tomatoes
instructions.instruction: Add crushed tomatoes and salt. Cook 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens.
instructions.tips: Sauce should reduce and darken.

instructions.title: Add chickpeas
instructions.instruction: Add chickpeas and 0.5 cup water. Simmer 10-15 minutes, mashing some chickpeas for creamier texture.
instructions.tips: Mashing some thickens the gravy!

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Taste and adjust salt. Garnish with fresh cilantro. Serve with rice or naan.
instructions.tips: Let it rest 5 min - flavors meld beautifully.

storage.reheating: Gentle heat, add splash of water

recipes.name: Ratatouille
recipes.description: Provençal vegetable stew with eggplant, zucchini, and tomatoes

instructions.title: Salt eggplant
instructions.instruction: Toss diced eggplant with salt, let sit 15 minutes. Rinse and pat dry. This removes bitterness.
instructions.tips: Don't skip this - makes a big difference!

instructions.title: Cook eggplant
instructions.instruction: Heat 2 tbsp oil in large pan over medium-high. Cook eggplant 8-10 minutes until golden. Remove.
instructions.tips: Eggplant absorbs oil - that's normal!

instructions.title: Cook peppers and zucchini
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil. Cook peppers and zucchini 6-8 minutes until softened. Remove.
instructions.tips: Keep vegetables separate for now.

instructions.title: Make tomato base
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil. Cook onion 5 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Add tomatoes, thyme, salt, pepper. Simmer 10 minutes.
instructions.tips: Sauce should thicken nicely.

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Return all vegetables to pan. Gently stir to combine. Simmer 10-15 minutes to meld flavors.
instructions.tips: Gentle stirring keeps vegetables intact.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Remove thyme sprigs. Stir in fresh basil. Serve warm or room temperature.
instructions.tips: Even better the next day!

storage.reheating: Gentle heat or serve cold

recipes.name: Mac and Cheese
recipes.description: Creamy, cheesy macaroni with crispy breadcrumb topping

equipment_substitutions.note: Can skip broiling and serve from stovetop.

instructions.title: Cook pasta
instructions.instruction: Cook macaroni in salted boiling water until al dente, about 7-8 minutes. Drain, don't rinse.
instructions.tips: Slightly undercooked is perfect!

instructions.title: Make roux
instructions.instruction: Melt butter in large pan over medium heat. Add flour, whisk constantly for 2 minutes until golden.
instructions.tips: This thickens the sauce - don't burn!

instructions.title: Make cheese sauce
instructions.instruction: Gradually whisk in milk. Cook 5-7 minutes, whisking, until thickened. Remove from heat.
instructions.tips: Should coat the back of a spoon.

instructions.title: Add cheese
instructions.instruction: Stir in mustard powder, paprika, salt. Add cheese in handfuls, stirring until melted and smooth.
instructions.tips: Off heat prevents cheese from seizing!

instructions.title: Combine
instructions.instruction: Add cooked pasta to cheese sauce. Stir well to coat. Transfer to greased baking dish if broiling.
instructions.tips: Can serve now or add topping!

instructions.title: Add topping and broil
instructions.instruction: Sprinkle breadcrumbs on top. Broil 3-5 minutes until golden and bubbly.
instructions.tips: Watch closely - burns fast!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Let cool 5 minutes before serving. The sauce thickens as it cools.
instructions.tips: Pure comfort food perfection!

storage.reheating: Add milk, heat gently

recipes.name: Cantonese Fried Rice
recipes.description: Classic Chinese fried rice with eggs, vegetables, and soy sauce

equipment_substitutions.note: Use highest heat. Works well but wok gives better texture.

instructions.title: Prep ingredients
instructions.instruction: Break up cold rice with hands. Have all ingredients ready - cooking goes fast!
instructions.tips: Day-old rice is KEY - fresh rice gets mushy!

instructions.title: Scramble eggs
instructions.instruction: Heat 1 tbsp oil in wok over high heat. Add beaten eggs, scramble until just set, 1 minute. Remove.
instructions.tips: Soft scramble is best!

instructions.title: Cook aromatics
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil. Stir-fry garlic 20 seconds. Add pork (if using), stir-fry 2 minutes.
instructions.tips: High heat! Keep everything moving.

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add carrots and peas. Stir-fry 2 minutes until carrots soften.
instructions.tips: Frozen peas cook quickly!

instructions.title: Add rice
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil if needed. Add rice, break up clumps. Stir-fry 3-4 minutes until rice is hot and slightly crispy.
instructions.tips: Press rice against wok for crispy bits!

instructions.title: Season
instructions.instruction: Return eggs to wok. Add soy sauce, sesame oil, white pepper. Toss well, 1 minute.
instructions.tips: Toss high to coat evenly!

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Add green onions, toss 30 seconds. Serve immediately.
instructions.tips: Perfect quick meal!

storage.reheating: Pan fry to restore texture

recipes.name: Falafel
recipes.description: Crispy chickpea fritters with herbs and spices

equipment_substitutions.note: Pulse carefully - don't over-process into paste.

instructions.title: Soak chickpeas
instructions.instruction: Soak dried chickpeas in water overnight (12 hours minimum). Drain well. DO NOT use canned chickpeas!
instructions.tips: Dried chickpeas are essential - canned won't work!

instructions.title: Process mixture
instructions.instruction: In food processor, combine chickpeas, onion, garlic, herbs. Pulse until coarsely ground, not smooth paste. Should hold together when squeezed.
instructions.tips: Texture should be like coarse breadcrumbs!

instructions.title: Add spices
instructions.instruction: Add cumin, coriander, cayenne, baking powder, flour, salt. Pulse to combine. Refrigerate mixture 1 hour.
instructions.tips: Chilling helps them hold shape when frying.

instructions.title: Shape falafel
instructions.instruction: Form mixture into small balls or patties (about 2 tbsp each). Should make 16-20 pieces.
instructions.tips: Wet hands prevent sticking!

instructions.title: Heat oil
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in deep pan to 350°F (175°C). Oil should be 2 inches deep.
instructions.tips: Test with small piece - should sizzle immediately.

instructions.title: Fry falafel
instructions.instruction: Fry in batches, 3-4 minutes per batch, turning once, until deep golden brown. Don't crowd the pan.
instructions.tips: Maintain oil temperature between batches!

instructions.title: Drain and serve
instructions.instruction: Drain on paper towels. Serve hot with tahini sauce, pita, and vegetables.
instructions.tips: Crispy outside, fluffy inside = perfect!

storage.reheating: Oven at 375°F until crispy

recipes.name: Hummus
recipes.description: Creamy chickpea dip with tahini, lemon, and garlic

equipment_substitutions.note: Add liquid gradually to help blend.

instructions.title: Blend tahini base
instructions.instruction: In food processor, blend tahini and lemon juice for 1 minute. Mixture will thicken, then smooth out. This is key!
instructions.tips: This step creates ultra-creamy texture!

instructions.title: Add aromatics
instructions.instruction: Add garlic, cumin, salt. Blend 30 seconds.
instructions.tips: Raw garlic gives punch - adjust to taste.

instructions.title: Add chickpeas
instructions.instruction: Add half the chickpeas. Blend 1 minute. Scrape down sides. Add remaining chickpeas, blend 1-2 minutes until smooth.
instructions.tips: Adding in batches helps it blend smoother.

instructions.title: Adjust consistency
instructions.instruction: With processor running, drizzle in ice water 1 tbsp at a time until desired creaminess. Should be light and fluffy.
instructions.tips: Ice water makes it extra creamy!

instructions.title: Taste and adjust
instructions.instruction: Taste. Add more salt, lemon, or garlic as needed. Blend briefly to combine.
instructions.tips: Trust your palate!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Transfer to serving bowl. Make well in center. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with paprika.
instructions.tips: The oil pool is traditional and delicious!

storage.reheating: Bring to room temp, stir well

recipes.name: Tortilla Española
recipes.description: Classic Spanish potato and egg omelette

instructions.title: Cook potatoes and onions
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in 10-inch pan over medium heat. Add potatoes and onions, season with salt. Cook gently 20-25 minutes, stirring occasionally, until potatoes are tender but not browned.
instructions.tips: Low and slow - we're poaching, not frying!

instructions.title: Drain
instructions.instruction: Use slotted spoon to transfer potatoes and onions to colander. Reserve the oil! Let drain 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Save that flavorful oil for another use!

instructions.title: Beat eggs
instructions.instruction: Beat eggs in large bowl with pinch of salt. Gently fold in drained potato mixture. Let sit 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Gentle folding keeps potatoes intact.

instructions.title: Cook tortilla
instructions.instruction: Heat 2 tbsp reserved oil in same pan over medium-high. Add egg mixture, spread evenly. Cook 5 minutes, shaking pan occasionally, until bottom is set.
instructions.tips: Use spatula to tuck edges in for nice shape.

instructions.title: Flip
instructions.instruction: Place large plate over pan. Flip tortilla onto plate. Slide back into pan, uncooked side down. Cook 3-4 minutes more.
instructions.tips: Confidence is key - flip decisively!

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Slide onto serving plate. Let cool to room temperature. The center should be slightly creamy.
instructions.tips: Best served at room temp, not hot!

storage.reheating: Room temp is traditional, or gentle microwave

recipes.name: Classic Roast Chicken
recipes.description: Perfectly roasted whole chicken with crispy skin and juicy meat

equipment_substitutions.note: Works great! Just ensure it fits the chicken.

instructions.title: Prep chicken
instructions.instruction: Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Remove giblets. Pat chicken completely dry inside and out with paper towels. This is crucial for crispy skin!
instructions.tips: Dry skin = crispy skin!

instructions.title: Season cavity
instructions.instruction: Season cavity with salt and pepper. Stuff with lemon halves, garlic, and thyme.
instructions.tips: Aromatics perfume the meat from inside!

instructions.title: Season outside
instructions.instruction: Rub butter all over chicken skin. Drizzle with olive oil. Season generously with salt and pepper. Tie legs together with kitchen string if desired.
instructions.tips: Don't be shy with the seasoning!

instructions.title: Roast
instructions.instruction: Place chicken breast-side up in roasting pan. Roast 60-75 minutes until internal temp reaches 165°F (74°C) in thickest part of thigh.
instructions.tips: Don't open oven too often - keeps heat stable.

instructions.title: Baste (optional)
instructions.instruction: Baste with pan juices every 20 minutes for extra-crispy skin.
instructions.tips: Basting adds flavor but isn't required.

instructions.title: Rest
instructions.instruction: Remove from oven when done. Tent with foil, rest 15 minutes before carving. Juices redistribute!
instructions.tips: Resting is NOT optional - crucial for juicy meat!

instructions.title: Carve and serve
instructions.instruction: Carve and serve with pan juices. Save carcass for stock!
instructions.tips: Nothing beats homemade roast chicken!

storage.reheating: Oven at 350°F until warm

recipes.name: Bibimbap
recipes.description: Korean mixed rice bowl with vegetables, egg, and gochujang

instructions.title: Marinate beef
instructions.instruction: Mix beef with 1 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, half the garlic. Marinate 15 minutes.
instructions.tips: Even short marination adds flavor!

instructions.title: Blanch vegetables
instructions.instruction: Blanch spinach 1 minute, bean sprouts 2 minutes. Drain, squeeze dry. Season each with pinch of salt and sesame oil.
instructions.tips: Keep vegetables separate for presentation!

instructions.title: Sauté vegetables
instructions.instruction: In pan with oil, sauté carrots 3 min, then zucchini 2 min, then mushrooms 3 min. Season each with salt and remaining garlic.
instructions.tips: Cook separately to control doneness!

instructions.title: Cook beef
instructions.instruction: In hot pan, cook marinated beef 3-4 minutes until cooked through. Set aside.
instructions.tips: High heat for quick sear!

instructions.title: Fry eggs
instructions.instruction: Fry eggs sunny-side up, keeping yolks runny.
instructions.tips: The runny yolk is key - it's the sauce!

instructions.title: Assemble bowls
instructions.instruction: Divide rice among 4 bowls. Arrange vegetables and beef in sections on top. Place fried egg in center. Drizzle with sesame oil.
instructions.tips: Beautiful presentation is traditional!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Serve with gochujang on the side. Mix everything together before eating, breaking the yolk!
instructions.tips: The mixing is the best part!

storage.reheating: Best assembled fresh

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.description: Classic French chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms and bacon

equipment_substitutions.note: Dutch oven is actually ideal for this dish.

instructions.title: Brown bacon
instructions.instruction: In large pot over medium heat, cook bacon until crispy, 8-10 minutes. Remove with slotted spoon, set aside. Leave fat in pot.
instructions.tips: Bacon fat adds incredible flavor!

instructions.title: Brown chicken
instructions.instruction: Season chicken with salt and pepper. Brown in bacon fat on all sides, 8-10 minutes total. Work in batches if needed. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Good browning = deep flavor in final dish.

instructions.title: Cook vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add carrots and pearl onions to pot. Cook 5 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Sprinkle with flour, stir to coat.
instructions.tips: Flour will thicken the sauce later.

instructions.title: Deglaze
instructions.instruction: Add tomato paste, cook 1 minute. Pour in wine, scraping up browned bits from bottom. Bring to simmer.
instructions.tips: Those browned bits are pure flavor!

instructions.title: Braise
instructions.instruction: Return chicken and bacon to pot. Add stock, thyme, and bay leaves. Cover, simmer gently 45-60 minutes until chicken is tender.
instructions.tips: Low and slow makes chicken fall-off-bone tender.

instructions.title: Cook mushrooms
instructions.instruction: In separate pan, sauté mushrooms in butter 5-7 minutes until golden. Add to pot in last 10 minutes of cooking.
instructions.tips: Cooking mushrooms separately keeps them from getting soggy.

instructions.title: Finish
instructions.instruction: Remove thyme sprigs and bay leaves. Taste, adjust seasoning. Garnish with parsley. Serve with crusty bread or mashed potatoes.
instructions.tips: Even better the next day - flavors deepen!

storage.reheating: Gentle heat on stovetop

recipes.name: Guacamole
recipes.description: Fresh avocado dip with lime, cilantro, and jalapeño

instructions.title: Prep avocados
instructions.instruction: Cut avocados in half, remove pits. Scoop flesh into bowl.
instructions.tips: Ripe avocados yield to gentle pressure.

instructions.title: Mash
instructions.instruction: Add lime juice immediately (prevents browning). Mash with fork to desired consistency - chunky or smooth, your choice!
instructions.tips: Lime juice is essential to prevent browning!

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add onion, tomato, jalapeño (remove seeds for less heat), cilantro, and garlic. Mix gently.
instructions.tips: Seeding tomato prevents watery guac.

instructions.title: Season
instructions.instruction: Add salt and cumin. Mix well. Taste and adjust - add more lime, salt, or jalapeño as needed.
instructions.tips: Trust your palate - season to taste!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Serve immediately with chips. To store, press plastic wrap directly on surface to prevent browning.
instructions.tips: Best fresh - browning is natural oxidation.

storage.fridge: 1 day with plastic wrap on surface
storage.reheating: Not applicable

recipes.name: Northern Chinese Dumplings
recipes.description: Hand-wrapped dumplings with pork and cabbage filling

equipment_substitutions.note: Works surprisingly well!

instructions.title: Prep cabbage
instructions.instruction: Salt chopped cabbage, let sit 10 minutes. Squeeze out excess water thoroughly. This is crucial!
instructions.tips: Watery filling makes soggy dumplings!

instructions.title: Make filling
instructions.instruction: Mix pork, drained cabbage, chives, ginger, garlic, soy sauce, sesame oil, wine, salt, white pepper. Mix in one direction for 3 minutes until sticky.
instructions.tips: Mixing in one direction creates better texture!

instructions.title: Wrap dumplings
instructions.instruction: Place 1 tbsp filling in center of wrapper. Wet edges with water. Fold in half, pinch center. Make 5-7 pleats on one side, press to seal. Repeat with remaining.
instructions.tips: Practice makes perfect - first ones might be ugly but delicious!

instructions.title: Boil method
instructions.instruction: Bring large pot of water to boil. Add dumplings in batches. When they float, cook 3 more minutes. Remove with slotted spoon.
instructions.tips: Don't crowd pot - they stick together!

instructions.title: Pan-fry method (potstickers)
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pan. Arrange dumplings. Cook 2 min until bottoms brown. Add 0.5 cup water, cover. Steam 6-8 min until water evaporates.
instructions.tips: The crispy bottom is what makes potstickers special!

instructions.title: Make dipping sauce
instructions.instruction: Mix equal parts soy sauce and black vinegar. Add chili oil if desired.
instructions.tips: Classic combo!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Serve hot with dipping sauce. Freeze uncooked extras in single layer, then transfer to bag.
instructions.tips: Homemade dumplings freeze beautifully!

storage.reheating: Steam or pan-fry from frozen

recipes.name: Tom Yum Soup
recipes.description: Hot and sour Thai soup with shrimp, mushrooms, and lemongrass

instructions.title: Make aromatic broth
instructions.instruction: Bring stock to boil. Add lemongrass, galangal, lime leaves, chilies. Simmer 10 minutes to infuse flavors.
instructions.tips: These aromatics create the signature Tom Yum flavor!

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add mushrooms and tomatoes. Simmer 5 minutes until mushrooms are tender.
instructions.tips: Cherry tomatoes add tartness and color.

instructions.title: Cook shrimp
instructions.instruction: Add shrimp. Cook 2-3 minutes until just pink and cooked through. Don't overcook!
instructions.tips: Overcooked shrimp get rubbery - watch closely!

instructions.title: Season
instructions.instruction: Remove from heat. Add fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, and chili paste if using. Taste and adjust balance.
instructions.tips: Should be hot, sour, salty, and slightly sweet!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Remove lemongrass, galangal, and lime leaves (or leave for presentation but don't eat). Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot.
instructions.tips: The aromatics are for flavor, not eating!

storage.reheating: Gentle heat, don't boil

recipes.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
recipes.description: Classic Roman pasta with eggs, guanciale, and Pecorino cheese

equipment_substitutions.note: Not traditional but still delicious. Guanciale is fattier and richer.

instructions.title: Boil pasta
instructions.instruction: Bring large pot of salted water to boil. Cook spaghetti until al dente, about 8-10 minutes. Reserve 2 cups pasta water before draining!
instructions.tips: Pasta water is ESSENTIAL - don't forget to save it!

instructions.title: Cook guanciale
instructions.instruction: While pasta cooks, cook guanciale in large pan over medium heat 6-8 minutes until fat renders and meat is crispy. No oil needed! Remove from heat.
instructions.tips: Guanciale releases its own fat - don't add oil!

instructions.title: Make egg mixture
instructions.instruction: In bowl, whisk together egg yolks, whole eggs, most of the Pecorino (save some for serving), and lots of black pepper.
instructions.tips: This creates the creamy sauce - no cream needed!

instructions.title: Combine pasta and guanciale
instructions.instruction: Add hot drained pasta to pan with guanciale. Toss well off heat. Let cool 1-2 minutes (important!).
instructions.tips: Too hot = scrambled eggs! Let it cool slightly.

instructions.title: Add egg mixture
instructions.instruction: Pour egg mixture over pasta. Toss vigorously, adding pasta water a little at a time until creamy and silky. Work quickly!
instructions.tips: The residual heat cooks eggs into silky sauce!

instructions.title: Adjust consistency
instructions.instruction: Keep tossing, adding more pasta water if needed. Should be creamy, not dry or clumpy.
instructions.tips: Don't be shy with pasta water!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Plate immediately. Top with remaining Pecorino and more black pepper. Serve at once!
instructions.tips: Carbonara waits for no one - eat immediately!

storage.reheating: Add pasta water, gentle heat

recipes.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
recipes.description: Tender chicken in creamy tomato-based curry with aromatic spices

instructions.title: Marinate chicken
instructions.instruction: Mix yogurt, lemon juice, 1 tsp garam masala, cumin, paprika, turmeric, and salt in bowl. Add chicken, coat well. Marinate 30 minutes minimum.
instructions.tips: Longer marination = more tender chicken!

instructions.title: Cook onions
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Add onions, cook 8-10 minutes until golden brown and soft.
instructions.tips: Browning onions builds deep flavor.

instructions.title: Add aromatics
instructions.instruction: Add garlic and ginger, cook 2 minutes until fragrant.
instructions.tips: Don't burn the garlic!

instructions.title: Add tomatoes and spices
instructions.instruction: Stir in tomato puree and remaining garam masala. Cook 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens.
instructions.tips: Sauce should reduce and darken slightly.

instructions.title: Cook chicken
instructions.instruction: Add marinated chicken with marinade. Stir well. Simmer 20 minutes until chicken is cooked through.
instructions.tips: Stir occasionally to prevent sticking.

instructions.title: Finish with cream
instructions.instruction: Reduce heat to low. Stir in cream. Simmer 5 minutes. Taste and adjust salt.
instructions.tips: Don't boil after adding cream.

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Garnish with cilantro. Serve hot with basmati rice or naan.
instructions.tips: Tastes even better the next day!

storage.reheating: Microwave 3-4 minutes or stovetop with splash of water

recipes.name: Bibimbap
recipes.description: Mixed rice bowl with vegetables, beef, and gochujang sauce

equipment_substitutions.note: Cook rice on stovetop - takes about 18 minutes.

instructions.title: Cook rice
instructions.instruction: Cook rice according to package directions. Set aside and keep warm.
instructions.tips: Fluffy rice is the foundation!

instructions.title: Marinate beef
instructions.instruction: Mix beef with 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp sesame oil, sugar, and half the garlic. Set aside 15 minutes.
instructions.tips: Even 15 minutes makes beef more flavorful.

instructions.title: Prepare vegetables
instructions.instruction: Blanch spinach 1 minute, drain, squeeze dry, season with pinch of salt and sesame oil. Blanch bean sprouts 2 minutes, drain. Set both aside separately.
instructions.tips: Keep vegetables separate for presentation.

instructions.title: Sauté vegetables
instructions.instruction: In pan with oil, sauté carrots 3 minutes. Remove. Sauté zucchini 3 minutes. Remove. Sauté mushrooms with remaining garlic 4 minutes. Season each with pinch of salt.
instructions.tips: Cook vegetables separately to maintain distinct flavors.

instructions.title: Cook beef
instructions.instruction: Heat pan over high heat. Cook marinated beef 3-4 minutes until browned and cooked through.
instructions.tips: High heat gives nice sear!

instructions.title: Fry eggs
instructions.instruction: Fry eggs sunny-side up in oil until whites are set but yolks are still runny.
instructions.tips: Runny yolk mixes into the rice beautifully.

instructions.title: Assemble bowls
instructions.instruction: Divide rice among 4 bowls. Arrange vegetables and beef in sections on top. Top each with fried egg. Add 1 tbsp gochujang per bowl. Sprinkle with sesame seeds and remaining sesame oil.
instructions.tips: Mix everything together before eating!

storage.fridge: Components store 3-4 days separately; assemble when ready to eat
storage.freezer: Rice and beef freeze well up to 2 months
storage.reheating: Microwave components separately, add fresh egg

recipes.name: Pad See Ew
recipes.description: Stir-fried wide rice noodles with Chinese broccoli and soy sauce

equipment_substitutions.note: Use highest heat possible.

instructions.title: Prep noodles
instructions.instruction: If noodles are stuck together, gently separate them. Set aside at room temperature.
instructions.tips: Cold noodles will break when stir-fried.

instructions.title: Mix sauce
instructions.instruction: Combine dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sugar in small bowl. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Having sauce ready makes cooking smooth.

instructions.title: Cook chicken
instructions.instruction: Heat 2 tbsp oil in wok over very high heat. Add chicken, stir-fry 3-4 minutes until just cooked. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't overcook - it cooks more later!

instructions.title: Cook eggs
instructions.instruction: Add 1 tbsp oil to wok. Pour in eggs, let set 10 seconds, then scramble. Push to side of wok.
instructions.tips: Eggs add texture and richness.

instructions.title: Stir-fry aromatics and vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add remaining 1 tbsp oil and garlic, stir 15 seconds. Add Chinese broccoli, stir-fry 2 minutes until slightly wilted.
instructions.tips: Broccoli should be tender-crisp.

instructions.title: Combine everything
instructions.instruction: Add noodles and chicken back to wok. Pour sauce over. Toss everything together over high heat 2-3 minutes until noodles are coated and slightly charred. Season with white pepper.
instructions.tips: The char (wok hei) is what makes this special!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Transfer to plates immediately. Serve hot.
instructions.tips: Best eaten immediately while hot!

storage.reheating: Pan-fry with splash of water to revive texture

recipes.name: Vietnamese Pho Bo
recipes.description: Aromatic beef noodle soup with star anise and rice noodles

instructions.title: Parboil bones
instructions.instruction: Place bones and brisket in large pot, cover with water. Bring to boil, boil 5 minutes. Drain, rinse bones and brisket under cold water to remove impurities.
instructions.tips: This removes impurities for clearer broth.

instructions.title: Char aromatics
instructions.instruction: Char onion halves and ginger slices directly over gas flame or under broiler until blackened on surface, about 5 minutes.
instructions.tips: Charring adds deep, smoky flavor!

instructions.title: Toast spices
instructions.instruction: Toast star anise, cinnamon, and coriander seeds in dry pan 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
instructions.tips: Releases essential oils for aromatic broth.

instructions.title: Make broth
instructions.instruction: Return bones and brisket to pot. Add 4 liters water, charred onions and ginger, toasted spices. Bring to boil, reduce to gentle simmer. Skim foam frequently. Simmer 60 minutes.
instructions.tips: Low simmer = clear broth. Keep skimming!

instructions.title: Remove brisket
instructions.instruction: After 60 minutes, remove brisket. Let cool, then slice thinly against the grain. Continue simmering broth another 30 minutes.
instructions.tips: Brisket is done when tender but sliceable.

instructions.title: Season broth
instructions.instruction: Strain broth through fine-mesh strainer. Discard solids. Return broth to pot. Season with fish sauce, sugar, and salt. Taste and adjust.
instructions.tips: Balance salty, sweet, savory!

instructions.title: Cook noodles
instructions.instruction: Cook rice noodles according to package directions until tender. Drain and rinse under cold water.
instructions.tips: Don't overcook - they soften more in hot broth.

instructions.title: Assemble bowls
instructions.instruction: Divide noodles among bowls. Top with sliced brisket and raw sirloin. Pour boiling broth over (this cooks the raw beef). Top with bean sprouts, herbs, green onions, cilantro. Serve with lime wedges and jalapeño.
instructions.tips: Boiling broth cooks the raw beef perfectly!

storage.fridge: Broth stores 5 days; store components separately
storage.reheating: Boil broth, assemble fresh bowls

recipes.name: Japanese Chicken Teriyaki
recipes.description: Glazed chicken thighs with sweet soy-based teriyaki sauce

instructions.title: Make teriyaki sauce
instructions.instruction: In small bowl, mix soy sauce, mirin, sake, sugar, ginger, and garlic. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Prep sauce first for smooth cooking.

instructions.title: Cook chicken
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken thighs, cook 5-6 minutes per side until golden brown and cooked through.
instructions.tips: Don't move chicken too much - let it brown!

instructions.title: Add sauce
instructions.instruction: Reduce heat to medium. Pour teriyaki sauce over chicken. Simmer 4-5 minutes, turning chicken occasionally to coat.
instructions.tips: Sauce will reduce and become glossy.

instructions.title: Thicken sauce
instructions.instruction: If sauce is too thin, add cornstarch mixture. Stir until sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
instructions.tips: Optional - traditional teriyaki is thin.

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Slice chicken. Drizzle with remaining sauce. Garnish with sesame seeds and green onions. Serve with rice.
instructions.tips: Slice on diagonal for presentation!

storage.reheating: Microwave 2-3 minutes or pan-fry to crisp up

recipes.name: Cantonese Char Siu
recipes.description: Sweet and savory roasted BBQ pork with honey glaze

instructions.title: Make marinade
instructions.instruction: Mix hoisin sauce, soy sauce, Shaoxing wine, 2 tbsp honey, brown sugar, five-spice powder, food coloring (if using), garlic, ginger, and sesame oil in bowl.
instructions.tips: Red color is traditional but optional.

instructions.title: Marinate pork
instructions.instruction: Add pork strips to marinade, coat well. Cover and refrigerate at least 4 hours or overnight.
instructions.tips: Overnight = maximum flavor!

instructions.title: Prepare oven
instructions.instruction: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Line baking sheet with foil. Place rack on top. Pour 1 cup water in pan below rack.
instructions.tips: Water prevents smoke and keeps pork moist.

instructions.title: First roast
instructions.instruction: Place pork strips on rack. Reserve marinade. Roast 20 minutes.
instructions.tips: Don't discard marinade - you'll use it!

instructions.title: Baste and flip
instructions.instruction: Flip pork, brush with reserved marinade. Roast another 15 minutes.
instructions.tips: Basting builds that glossy coating!

instructions.title: Final glaze
instructions.instruction: Mix remaining 1 tbsp honey with 1 tbsp marinade. Brush pork with honey mixture. Increase heat to 425°F (220°C). Roast 5-8 minutes until edges are caramelized and slightly charred.
instructions.tips: Watch closely - you want char, not burnt!

instructions.title: Rest and slice
instructions.instruction: Let pork rest 10 minutes. Slice against the grain into thick pieces. Serve with rice or in buns.
instructions.tips: Resting keeps juices in!

storage.reheating: Microwave 2-3 minutes or oven at 350°F for 10 minutes

recipes.name: Singapore Laksa
recipes.description: Spicy coconut curry noodle soup with seafood and tofu puffs

instructions.title: Fry laksa paste
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Add laksa paste, fry 3-4 minutes until fragrant and oil separates.
instructions.tips: Paste should smell amazing and darken slightly.

instructions.title: Add liquids
instructions.instruction: Pour in coconut milk and chicken stock. Add lemongrass and lime leaves. Bring to gentle simmer.
instructions.tips: Don't boil coconut milk hard or it splits.

instructions.title: Season broth
instructions.instruction: Add fish sauce and sugar. Simmer 15 minutes to develop flavors. Taste and adjust seasoning.
instructions.tips: Should be spicy, rich, and slightly sweet.

instructions.title: Cook noodles
instructions.instruction: Cook noodles according to package directions. Drain and set aside.
instructions.tips: Rinse in cold water to stop cooking.

instructions.title: Blanch bean sprouts
instructions.instruction: Blanch bean sprouts in boiling water 30 seconds. Drain.
instructions.tips: Brief blanching keeps them crunchy.

instructions.title: Cook seafood
instructions.instruction: Add shrimp, fish cake, and tofu puffs to simmering broth. Cook 3-4 minutes until shrimp are pink and cooked through.
instructions.tips: Don't overcook shrimp!

instructions.title: Assemble bowls
instructions.instruction: Divide noodles and bean sprouts among bowls. Ladle hot broth with seafood over top. Top each bowl with half egg, cilantro. Serve with lime wedges.
instructions.tips: Squeeze lime over for brightness!

storage.fridge: Broth stores 3 days; store components separately
storage.reheating: Heat broth, assemble fresh bowls

recipes.name: Filipino Chicken Adobo
recipes.description: Braised chicken in tangy soy-vinegar sauce with garlic

instructions.title: Marinate chicken
instructions.instruction: In large pot, combine chicken, soy sauce, vinegar, garlic, bay leaves, peppercorns, and sugar. Let marinate 30 minutes at room temperature.
instructions.tips: Marinating adds flavor depth.

instructions.title: Braise chicken
instructions.instruction: Add water to pot. Bring to boil over high heat. Reduce to simmer, cover. Cook 30 minutes until chicken is tender.
instructions.tips: Don't stir too much - let it braise gently.

instructions.title: Reduce sauce
instructions.instruction: Remove chicken to plate. Increase heat to medium-high. Boil sauce 8-10 minutes until reduced and slightly thickened.
instructions.tips: Sauce should be glossy and coat a spoon.

instructions.title: Crisp chicken (optional)
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in pan over medium-high heat. Brown chicken pieces skin-side down 3-4 minutes until crispy. This step is optional but adds great texture!
instructions.tips: This step elevates the dish!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Return chicken to sauce. Garnish with green onions. Serve with steamed rice.
instructions.tips: The sauce is perfect poured over rice!

storage.reheating: Microwave 3-4 minutes or stovetop until hot

recipes.name: Malaysian Nasi Lemak
recipes.description: Fragrant coconut rice with sambal, peanuts, and anchovies

equipment_substitutions.note: Cook rice on stovetop with coconut milk.

instructions.title: Cook coconut rice
instructions.instruction: Mix rice with coconut milk, 1 cup water, pandan leaves, and pinch of salt. Cook in rice cooker or pot until fluffy, about 20 minutes.
instructions.tips: Pandan gives amazing fragrance!

instructions.title: Make sambal paste
instructions.instruction: Blend soaked chilies, shallots, garlic, and belacan into smooth paste.
instructions.tips: Add a bit of water if needed to blend.

instructions.title: Cook sambal
instructions.instruction: Heat 3 tbsp oil in pan over medium heat. Fry sambal paste 8-10 minutes until oil separates and paste darkens. Add tamarind paste, sugar, salt. Cook 2 more minutes. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Low and slow prevents burning!

instructions.title: Fry anchovies
instructions.instruction: In same pan with remaining oil, fry anchovies 3-4 minutes until crispy. Drain on paper towel.
instructions.tips: Don't over-fry or they become bitter.

instructions.title: Assemble plates
instructions.instruction: Serve coconut rice topped with sambal, crispy anchovies, roasted peanuts, cucumber slices, and halved eggs.
instructions.tips: Mix everything together when eating!

storage.fridge: Rice and sambal store 3 days separately; eggs and cucumber add fresh
storage.freezer: Rice and sambal freeze up to 2 months
storage.reheating: Microwave rice 2-3 minutes, warm sambal in pan

recipes.name: Indonesian Rendang
recipes.description: Slow-cooked beef in rich coconut and spice curry

instructions.title: Make spice paste
instructions.instruction: Blend shallots, garlic, ginger, galangal, soaked chilies, turmeric, coriander, and cumin into smooth paste. Add water if needed.
instructions.tips: Paste should be very smooth.

instructions.title: Fry spice paste
instructions.instruction: Heat oil in large pot over medium heat. Fry spice paste 10-12 minutes until fragrant and oil separates.
instructions.tips: This step is crucial for deep flavor!

instructions.title: Add beef and coconut milk
instructions.instruction: Add beef chunks, lemongrass, lime leaves. Stir to coat beef with paste. Pour in coconut milk. Bring to boil.
instructions.tips: Coat beef well before adding liquid.

instructions.title: First simmer
instructions.instruction: Reduce heat to low. Simmer uncovered 90 minutes, stirring every 15 minutes to prevent sticking. Coconut milk will reduce significantly.
instructions.tips: Patience is key - don't rush this!

instructions.title: Add seasonings
instructions.instruction: Add tamarind paste, palm sugar, and salt. Continue simmering another 45-60 minutes, stirring frequently, until sauce is very thick and dark, and oil separates.
instructions.tips: Sauce should be almost dry and coat meat.

instructions.title: Final stage
instructions.instruction: When beef is very tender and sauce clings to meat with dark brown color, it's done. Remove lemongrass stalks.
instructions.tips: Traditional rendang is quite dry, not saucy!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Serve with steamed rice. Tastes even better the next day!
instructions.tips: Flavors deepen overnight!

storage.reheating: Microwave 3-4 minutes or stovetop until hot

recipes.name: Coq au Vin
recipes.description: Chicken braised in red wine with mushrooms and pearl onions

equipment_substitutions.note: Any heavy-bottomed pot works.

instructions.title: Brown bacon and chicken
instructions.instruction: Cook bacon in Dutch oven over medium heat until crispy, 5-6 minutes. Remove and set aside. Season chicken with salt and pepper. Brown chicken in bacon fat on all sides, about 8 minutes total. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't crowd the pan - brown in batches if needed!

instructions.title: Sauté vegetables
instructions.instruction: In same pot, add pearl onions and carrots. Cook 5 minutes until lightly browned. Add mushrooms and garlic, cook 3 more minutes.
instructions.tips: Deglazing all those brown bits = flavor!

instructions.title: Add flour and tomato paste
instructions.instruction: Sprinkle flour over vegetables, stir 1 minute. Add tomato paste, stir another minute.
instructions.tips: Cooking flour removes raw taste.

instructions.title: Deglaze with wine
instructions.instruction: Pour in red wine, scraping up all brown bits from bottom. Bring to boil, cook 5 minutes to reduce slightly.
instructions.tips: This concentrates the wine flavor!

instructions.title: Braise chicken
instructions.instruction: Return chicken and bacon to pot. Add chicken stock, bay leaves, and thyme. Bring to boil, then reduce to low simmer. Cover and cook 45-50 minutes until chicken is very tender.
instructions.tips: Low and slow makes chicken fall-off-the-bone tender!

instructions.title: Finish sauce
instructions.instruction: Remove chicken to serving platter. Increase heat to medium-high. Boil sauce 10 minutes to thicken. Stir in butter. Taste and adjust salt and pepper.
instructions.tips: Butter adds silky richness!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Pour sauce over chicken. Garnish with parsley. Serve with crusty bread or mashed potatoes.
instructions.tips: Even better the next day!

storage.reheating: Stovetop over low heat or oven at 325°F for 20 minutes

recipes.name: Paella Valenciana
recipes.description: Traditional Spanish rice with chicken, rabbit, and vegetables

equipment_substitutions.note: Use widest pan you have for best results.

ingredients.name: rabbit
ingredients.preparation: cut into pieces (or use more chicken)

instructions.title: Prepare saffron
instructions.instruction: Steep saffron threads in 2 tbsp hot stock. Set aside.
instructions.tips: This releases the color and flavor!

instructions.title: Brown meats
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in paella pan over medium-high heat. Season chicken and rabbit with salt. Brown on all sides, about 8 minutes. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Good browning = deep flavor!

instructions.title: Cook vegetables
instructions.instruction: In same pan, add green beans and butter beans. Cook 5 minutes. Add garlic and grated tomato, cook 3 minutes until tomato reduces.
instructions.tips: Let tomato cook down well.

instructions.title: Add rice and seasonings
instructions.instruction: Stir in rice, paprika, and rosemary. Toast rice 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
instructions.tips: Toasting rice adds nutty flavor!

instructions.title: Add stock
instructions.instruction: Pour in hot stock and saffron mixture. Arrange chicken and rabbit on top. Do NOT stir! Bring to boil, then reduce to medium heat. Cook 20 minutes without stirring.
instructions.tips: Never stir paella after adding stock!

instructions.title: Create socarrat
instructions.instruction: Increase heat to high for final 3-5 minutes to create crispy bottom layer (socarrat). Listen for crackling sound. Remove from heat when you smell toasted rice.
instructions.tips: The crispy bottom is the prize!

instructions.title: Rest and serve
instructions.instruction: Cover with foil or cloth. Let rest 5 minutes. Serve with lemon wedges.
instructions.tips: Resting distributes moisture evenly!

storage.reheating: Oven at 350°F covered, then uncovered to crisp

recipes.name: Beef Goulash
recipes.description: Rich paprika-spiced beef stew with peppers and potatoes

instructions.title: Brown beef
instructions.instruction: Heat lard in Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Season beef with salt and pepper. Brown beef in batches, about 8 minutes total. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't crowd the pot - brown in batches!

instructions.title: Cook onions
instructions.instruction: Reduce heat to medium. Add onions to pot, cook 10 minutes until very soft and lightly caramelized.
instructions.tips: Slow-cooked onions = sweet depth!

instructions.title: Add paprika
instructions.instruction: Remove pot from heat. Stir in paprika immediately (this prevents burning). Return to heat, stir 30 seconds.
instructions.tips: Paprika burns easily - watch carefully!

instructions.title: Add aromatics and tomatoes
instructions.instruction: Add garlic, tomato paste, caraway seeds, and canned tomatoes. Stir well for 2 minutes.
instructions.tips: Build layers of flavor!

instructions.title: Braise beef
instructions.instruction: Return beef to pot. Add beef stock and bay leaves. Bring to boil, then reduce to low simmer. Cover and cook 90 minutes, stirring occasionally.
instructions.tips: Low and slow = tender beef!

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add bell peppers and potatoes. Continue simmering uncovered 30 minutes until vegetables are tender and sauce has thickened.
instructions.tips: Potatoes thicken the sauce naturally!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Taste and adjust salt. Serve hot with a dollop of sour cream if desired. Serve with crusty bread or egg noodles.
instructions.tips: Even better the next day!

storage.reheating: Stovetop over low heat, add splash of stock if needed

recipes.name: Moussaka
recipes.description: Layered eggplant and meat casserole with béchamel sauce

instructions.title: Prepare eggplant
instructions.instruction: Sprinkle eggplant slices with salt, let sit 20 minutes. Rinse and pat dry. Brush with olive oil. Broil or grill 3-4 minutes per side until golden. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Salting removes bitterness and excess moisture!

instructions.title: Make meat sauce
instructions.instruction: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in pan over medium-high heat. Cook onion 5 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Add lamb, cook 8 minutes until browned.
instructions.tips: Break up meat well for even cooking.

instructions.title: Add sauce ingredients
instructions.instruction: Add tomatoes, tomato paste, wine, cinnamon, oregano, salt, and pepper. Simmer 20 minutes until thickened. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Cinnamon is the secret Greek flavor!

instructions.title: Make béchamel
instructions.instruction: Melt butter in pot over medium heat. Add flour, whisk 2 minutes. Gradually add warm milk, whisking constantly. Cook 8-10 minutes until thick. Remove from heat.
instructions.tips: Constant whisking = no lumps!

instructions.title: Finish béchamel
instructions.instruction: Let béchamel cool 5 minutes. Whisk in beaten eggs, half the Parmesan, nutmeg, salt, and pepper.
instructions.tips: Cool first or eggs will scramble!

instructions.title: Assemble moussaka
instructions.instruction: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). In 9x13 baking dish, layer half the eggplant, all the meat sauce, remaining eggplant, then béchamel. Sprinkle remaining Parmesan on top.
instructions.tips: Neat layers make beautiful slices!

instructions.title: Bake
instructions.instruction: Bake 45-50 minutes until golden brown and bubbling. Let rest 20 minutes before cutting.
instructions.tips: Resting makes it easier to slice!

storage.reheating: Oven at 350°F for 20-25 minutes

recipes.name: Osso Buco
recipes.description: Braised veal shanks in white wine and vegetable sauce

instructions.title: Prepare veal
instructions.instruction: Pat veal shanks dry. Season generously with salt and pepper. Dredge in flour, shaking off excess.
instructions.tips: Dry meat browns better!

instructions.title: Brown veal
instructions.instruction: Heat olive oil in Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown veal shanks on all sides, about 10 minutes total. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't move them too much - let them brown!

instructions.title: Cook vegetables
instructions.instruction: In same pot, add onion, carrots, and celery. Cook 8 minutes until softened. Add garlic, cook 1 minute more.
instructions.tips: This is the classic Italian soffritto!

instructions.title: Deglaze
instructions.instruction: Pour in white wine. Bring to boil, scraping up brown bits. Boil 5 minutes to reduce by half.
instructions.tips: Reducing wine concentrates flavor!

instructions.title: Braise veal
instructions.instruction: Add tomatoes, stock, bay leaves, and thyme. Return veal to pot, standing upright (to keep marrow in bones). Bring to simmer, cover, and braise in 325°F (165°C) oven for 90-120 minutes until very tender.
instructions.tips: Veal should be fall-apart tender!

instructions.title: Make gremolata
instructions.instruction: Mix lemon zest with half the parsley and 1 minced garlic clove. Set aside.
instructions.tips: This bright topping is essential!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Remove veal carefully to serving plates. If sauce is thin, reduce on stovetop 5 minutes. Pour sauce over veal. Top with gremolata and remaining parsley. Serve with risotto alla milanese.
instructions.tips: The marrow is the prize - scoop it out!

storage.reheating: Oven at 325°F covered for 25-30 minutes

recipes.name: Boeuf Bourguignon
recipes.description: Classic beef stew braised in red wine with bacon and vegetables

instructions.title: Brown bacon and beef
instructions.instruction: Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C). Cook bacon in Dutch oven over medium heat until crispy, 6-7 minutes. Remove bacon, leave fat. Pat beef dry, season with salt and pepper. Brown beef in batches in bacon fat, about 8 minutes per batch. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Dry beef = better browning!

instructions.title: Cook vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add carrots to pot, cook 5 minutes. Add garlic, cook 1 minute. Sprinkle flour over vegetables, stir 2 minutes. Add tomato paste, stir 1 minute.
instructions.tips: Flour needs to cook to thicken properly.

instructions.title: Deglaze and braise
instructions.instruction: Pour in wine, scraping up brown bits. Add stock, bay leaves, thyme, and bacon. Return beef to pot. Bring to simmer, cover, transfer to oven. Braise 90 minutes.
instructions.tips: Low oven heat = tender beef!

instructions.title: Cook pearl onions
instructions.instruction: While beef braises, melt 2 tbsp butter in pan over medium heat. Add pearl onions, cook 15 minutes until golden and tender. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Caramelizing adds sweetness!

instructions.title: Cook mushrooms
instructions.instruction: In same pan, melt remaining 2 tbsp butter. Cook mushrooms 8-10 minutes until browned. Set aside.
instructions.tips: Don't crowd the pan!

instructions.title: Combine everything
instructions.instruction: After 90 minutes, add pearl onions and mushrooms to pot. Return to oven uncovered for final 30 minutes. Sauce should be thick and glossy.
instructions.tips: Uncovered lets sauce reduce perfectly!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Remove bay leaves and thyme stems. Taste and adjust salt. Garnish with parsley. Serve with mashed potatoes or crusty bread.
instructions.tips: Even better the next day!

storage.reheating: Stovetop over low heat or oven at 325°F for 25 minutes

recipes.name: Irish Beef Stew
recipes.description: Hearty beef and vegetable stew with Guinness

instructions.title: Brown beef
instructions.instruction: Pat beef dry, season with salt and pepper. Toss in flour. Heat oil in Dutch oven over medium-high heat. Brown beef in batches, about 8 minutes total. Remove and set aside.
instructions.tips: Flouring first helps thicken stew!

instructions.title: Cook aromatics
instructions.instruction: Reduce heat to medium. Add onions and celery, cook 6 minutes until softened. Add garlic and tomato paste, cook 2 minutes.
instructions.tips: Don't skip the tomato paste!

instructions.title: Deglaze with Guinness
instructions.instruction: Pour in Guinness, scraping up brown bits. Bring to boil, cook 5 minutes to reduce slightly.
instructions.tips: The beer adds deep, malty flavor!

instructions.title: Braise beef
instructions.instruction: Return beef to pot. Add beef stock, bay leaves, and thyme. Bring to boil, reduce to low simmer. Cover and cook 90 minutes, stirring occasionally.
instructions.tips: Low and slow = fork-tender beef!

instructions.title: Add vegetables
instructions.instruction: Add carrots and potatoes. Continue simmering uncovered 35-40 minutes until vegetables are tender and sauce has thickened.
instructions.tips: Potatoes help thicken the stew!

instructions.title: Serve
instructions.instruction: Remove bay leaves and thyme stems. Taste and adjust salt. Garnish with parsley. Serve with crusty bread.
instructions.tips: Perfect comfort food for cold days!

storage.reheating: Stovetop over low heat, add splash of stock if needed

recipes.name: Wiener Schnitzel
recipes.description: Crispy breaded veal cutlets served with lemon

ingredients.name: clarified butter
ingredients.preparation: or mix of butter and oil

instructions.title: Pound veal
instructions.instruction: Place veal between two sheets of plastic wrap. Pound with meat mallet until 1/4-inch thick. Season both sides with salt and pepper.
instructions.tips: Even thickness = even cooking!

instructions.title: Set up breading station
instructions.instruction: Set up three shallow bowls: flour in first, beaten eggs in second, breadcrumbs in third.
instructions.tips: Assembly line makes breading efficient!

instructions.title: Bread cutlets
instructions.instruction: Dredge each cutlet in flour, shaking off excess. Dip in egg, letting excess drip off. Press into breadcrumbs, coating completely. Place on plate.
